name: on frError
title: on frError
description: The event procedure is called in the event of a general error being detected on the FlexRay bus.
return: The error time stamp that has been synchronized with the global time base in the

description: The following program reacts on bus errors and prints them in the Write Window, Trace Window, and logging.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units

row: The error time stamp that has been synchronized with the global time base in the computer (CAN hardware or computer system clock). The time stamp must be used if time relations should be regarded with events from other sources. This time stamp is also output in the Trace Window when receiving a symbol. Unit:10 microseconds Write-protected!
Channel in the tool that the FlexRay CC determines. Write-protected!
Identifies the type of the FlexRay hardware (data type: dword): 0 HW independent 1 Invalid 2 Not used 3 Not used 4 FlexCard Cyclone II 5 Vector FlexRay hardware Write-protected!

Identifies the error type (data type: LONG) -1 Unknown error 0 NO error 1 FlexCard Overflow 2 POC Error Mode Changed 3 Sync Frames Below Minimum 4 Sync Frame Overflow 5 Clock Correction Failure 6 Parity Error 7 Receive FIFO Overrun 8 Empty FIFO Access 9 Illegal Input Buffer Access 10 Illegal Output Buffer Access 11 Syntax Error 12 Content Error 13 Slot Boundary Violation 14 Transmission Across Boundary Channel A 15 Transmission Across Boundary Channel B 16 Latest Transmit Violation Channel A 17 Latest Transmit Violation Channel B 18 Error Detection on Channel A 19 Error Detection on Channel B 20 Message Handler Constraints Flag Error 21 NIT SENA (Syntax Error during NIT Channel A) 22 NIT SBNA (Slot Boundary Violation during NIT Channel A) 23 NIT SENB (Syntax Error during NIT Channel B) 24 NIT SBNB (Slot Boundary Violation during NIT Channel B) 25 Internal Error Overflow 26 Wrong Frame 27 Bus Guardian Error 28 CHI Error 29 Error Handling Level Changed 30 Symbol Received Write-protected!
